contributors.label: Contributors
features.title: Your Everything App for Payments.
features.lead: LNbits is a modular payments platform — a wallet, app store, and automation engine in one.
features.list_html:
✔️ Point of Sale (shops, cafés, events, mobile vendors)
✔️ Online checkout & donation buttons
✔️ Nostr zaps, paid posts, and micropayments
✔️ Vending machines, kiosks, and hardware devices
✔️ Subscriptions, paywalls, and recurring payments
✔️ Tipping, crowdfunding, and community funding
✔️ APIs for apps, games, and services
✔️ Extensions to build anything on top of payments
extensions.title: LNbits extension universe.
extensions.subtitle: Build LNbits your way.
extensions.body:
LNbits keeps the core minimal and powerful. Everything else lives as optional extensions — so you only run what you actually need.

Add features, remove bloat, and even build and share your own extensions.
bootstrap.title: Bootstrap your lightning payments.
bootstrap.subtitle:
One API to rule them all.
Runs on ANY Lighting Network funding source
bootstrap.list_html:
✔️ Free and open-source
✔️ 6 years of real world use and hardening
✔️ Cutting edge, with new funding sources being added regularly.
✔️ NOSTR and LNURL native: create boltcards, nostr relays, sell NIP05s, vouchers, etc.
✔️ No more refactoring code for developers; changing your funding source is trivial.
✔️ Eyes on the code; huge user and developer community keeping LNbits updated.
frameworks.title: Frameworks used in LNbits.
frameworks.frontend.label: FRONTEND:
frameworks.frontend.body: Front-end framework with VueJS components for high-performance, responsive websites, PWA, SSR, Mobile and Desktop apps,
frameworks.backend.label: BACKEND:
frameworks.backend.body: LNbits uses FastAPI, a modern, high-performance Python API framework, that's easy to build on.
connect.title: Getting started.
community.title: LNbits Community
community.body: LNbits has an incredible community of users and developers, exchanging ideas, helping each other, and extending the free and open-source software.
site.title: lnbits.com
site.body: This server is maintained by a few LNbits developers as an example demo of the software.
footer.desc: Free Open-Source Lightning Accounts System with Extensions. Run for yourself, for others, or as part of a stack. LNbits extension framework makes building easy.
